steps.t: The hobbit Reginard has gone missing. You might find clues to his whereabouts at his camp-site in the marsh west of Tighfield.
You have found Reginard's camp-site, but not him. You should examine the footprints at the camp-site.
Goblins may have captured Reginard and taken him to Lhúngobel. You should try to find him there.
The goblins have held Reginard captive in Lhúngobel. You should talk to him.
